message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
rectangle "Frontend" as Frontend
rectangle "API" as API
database "Database" as Database

rectangle "Log in with token" as LoginWithToken
rectangle "Log in without token" as LoginWithoutToken

User -> Frontend : Request token
alt [Token found]
  Frontend -> API : Validate token
  API -> Database : Find token
  Database --> API : Return matching user
  API --> Frontend : Open main page
else [Token not in database]
  API --> Frontend : Return error
  Frontend --> User : Open loginpage
end

User -> Frontend : Enter login information
User -> Frontend : Accept to be remembered
User -> Frontend : Press "Log in"
Frontend -> API : Request validation
API -> Database : Validate login information
alt [validation successful]
  Database --> API : Validation successful
  API --> Frontend : Add token to user
  Frontend --> User : Move to main page
else [validation failure]
  Database --> API : Validation failed
  API --> Frontend : Show error message
  Frontend --> User : Retry login page
end

@enduml
